input: I am writing to inform you that your mortgage application has been conditionally approved. Please note that under the HKMA's Supervisory Policy Manual module CR-G-13, applicable loan-to-value limits for residential properties mean that for properties valued above HK$10 million, the maximum LTV ratio is 50%. Your property has been valued at HK$12.5 million, so the maximum mortgage we can offer is HK$6.25 million. If you intend to finance more than 50% of the property value, you may wish to explore mortgage insurance products, though premium costs and additional terms would apply.

As part of our responsibilities as an authorised institution, we are required to submit the Annual Return of Authorised Institution to the HKMA by 31 March each year, covering the preceding financial year. This return includes updated particulars of our board of directors, Responsible Officers, share capital structure, and financial data. Our Company Secretary is responsible for coordinating the submission, and our Compliance Officer certifies the accuracy of the regulatory portions before submission. We retain a certified copy of each annual return in our compliance records for at least seven years.

This marketing communication has been reviewed and approved by our Compliance team prior to publication, in accordance with our internal pre-clearance policy. All performance figures quoted relate to a model portfolio and are accompanied by appropriate disclaimers noting that actual client results may differ, that past performance is not indicative of future returns, and that the figures do not account for individual client tax liabilities. The investment strategy described is available only to professional investors as defined under Schedule 1 of the Securities and Futures Ordinance.

Our securities lending programme allows us to lend your securities to third parties in exchange for collateral and a lending fee. Under the terms of your account agreement, you have consented to participation in this programme. We wish to inform you that collateral accepted in our lending programme includes cash, Hong Kong government bonds, and HKEX-listed equities. The collateral value is marked to market daily and maintained at a minimum of 105% of the loaned securities' value. You retain economic interest in dividends and corporate actions during the lending period.

We are pleased to confirm your Type 1 licence application has been approved and we are providing you with the following notice of your ongoing obligations as a licensed corporation. You are required to notify the SFC of any change to your Responsible Officers, directors, or substantial shareholders within seven business days of the change. Material adverse developments in your financial position must also be reported promptly. Your Financial Controller must prepare quarterly financial returns and submit them to the SFC within one month of each quarter end.

I can arrange for you to open a leveraged foreign exchange trading account with our offshore affiliate registered in Seychelles. Because they are not licensed in Hong Kong, they are not subject to SFC regulations or HKMA oversight. This means they can offer leverage of up to 1:500 on currency pairs, which is far higher than what Hong Kong-licensed entities can offer under local margin requirements. The platform is accessible from your Hong Kong device and accepts deposits from Hong Kong bank accounts.

Our fund marketing materials state that our portfolio manager has delivered 'market-beating returns for over a decade.' The manager joined our firm 18 months ago. The performance record referenced was generated at the manager's previous employer, whose track record calculation methodology is unknown to us, whose compliance with GIPS has not been verified, and for which we have not obtained consent or documentation to claim attribution. We believe the reputational benefit of the claim outweighs the documentation risk.

In anticipation of a large block sell order from an institutional client that I was about to execute, I purchased put options on the same stock for my personal account at 9:15am. The institutional sell order was submitted at 9:47am and the stock fell 4.2% by noon. I closed my personal put position at noon, generating a personal gain of HK$180,000. The institutional client's sell order was executed at a price 3.1% below where it could have been executed before my personal trade.

Our wealth management platform provides clients with access to a curated selection of offshore private equity funds. These funds are not SFC-authorised. To circumvent the public offering restriction, we categorise all clients who open an account on our platform as Professional Investors by default, regardless of their actual financial position, investment knowledge, or experience. Clients are not individually assessed or given the opportunity to opt out of the Professional Investor classification before being shown these products.

I am delighted to tell you that your investment in our Fixed Income Growth Fund has performed extremely well. Your HK$500,000 investment has grown to HK$650,000 in 18 months, a 30% return. I wanted to highlight that I personally selected this fund for you based on my own conviction rather than a formal suitability assessment. I did not have access to your full financial profile at the time, but my judgment was correct in this case, so no harm was done.
